TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Naihunpu, title = Naihunpu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Naihunpu} }

S.FORM: alang Naihunpu ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 656 buwan, 1,803 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 575 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 1,228 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 30%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 0.5%, Amis 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Naihunpu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Naihunpu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Naihunpu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Naihunpu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Naihunpu hya' ga Lanngdun. tay mkyahu' na Naihunpu hya' ga Salitung. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Naihunpu ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 656 buwan, 1,803 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 575 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 1,228 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 30%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 0.5%, Amis 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Naihunpu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Naihunpu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Naihunpu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Naihunpu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Naihunpu hya' ga Lanngdun. tay mkyahu' na Naihunpu hya' ga Salitung. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ naiħunpu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, pajwan *%, tajan *.*%, amis~ɕ *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na naiħunpu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na naiħunpu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na naiħunpu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na naiħunpu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na naiħunpu ħjaʔ ɣa lanŋ*un. taj mkjaħuʔ na naiħunpu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕalituŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
